title: ionopsidium prolongoi var. heterospermum

The roots of Ionopsidium prolongoi var. heterospermum are known to contain glycosides, including ionoside, which may exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves, on the other hand, are rich in flavonoids, including rutin and quercetin, which have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects.
